title: Super Metroid
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Action-Adventure game.

A lone armored explorer with an arm-mounted tool in an alien cavern with massive biomechanical pillars, acid glow, and a dark passage ahead, aiming the arm-mounted tool into the dark in hostile silence.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- SNES aesthetic, rich pixel art, layered backgrounds, soft gradients, and readable 16-bit atmosphere
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- isolated, mysterious, alien

Composition:
- single explorer foreground, one clear passage, deep cavern layers, sparse readable glow
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Samus suit likeness, avoid Metroid creature silhouette, avoid Chozo-like symbols, avoid sword-like weapon silhouettes, avoid resemblance to metroid. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid Samus suit likeness, avoid Metroid creature silhouette, avoid Chozo-like symbols, avoid sword-like weapon silhouettes, avoid resemblance to metroid
revised_prompt: A detailed high contrast image of an exploration scene in a rich pixel art style, inspired by the aesthetics of a retro Action-Adventure game with an emphasis on the Super Nintendo Entertainment System. The style should adopt a clean and modern interpretation of old-school limitations with a limited color palette. Visualize a lone, armored, Caucasian female explorer in the foreground, brandishing an arm-mounted futuristic tool into the darkness of a mysterious alien cavern. The cave has biomechanical pillars and acid-like luminescence reflecting from its surfaces, providing a sparse, readable glow for the dark passage that lurks ahead. The scene showcases a feeling of isolation, mystery, and fascination associated with alien environments. Avoid any form of text, recognizable characters, watermarks, user interface elements or copyrighted designs in order to make the illustration feel original while upholding the iconic atmosphere of retro game genres.
